He berkata, 'This man has sent you a messenger and written you a letter offering you one of three choices: either you follow him in his religion, or you pay him a tribute that he levies upon you while he leaves you in your state in your lands, or you wage war against him.' They snorted so fiercely that some of them nearly burst from their cloaks, and mereka berkata, 'We tidak akan follow him in his religion and abandon our religion and the religion of our fathers, and we tidak akan pay him a tribute levied upon us. Rather, we will wage war against him.' He berkata, 'That was indeed so, but I disliked acting on a matter without consulting you.' ʿAbbād berkata: aku berkata to Ibn Khuthaym, 'Had he not come close and intended to accept Islam, as has reached us?' He berkata, 'Yes, were it not for what dia melihat from them.' He then berkata, 'Find me a man dari the Arabs so that I may write with him a reply to his letter.' He berkata: So I was brought, being a young man, and taken to him. He wrote his reply and said to me, 'Whatever else you may forget, remember three things from me: Look when he reads my letter, does he mention the night and the day? Does he mention his letter to me? And look whether you see on his back a mark.' He berkata: So I set out until aku datang to him at Tabūk, in a circle of his para sahabat sitting with their knees drawn up. aku bertanya and was directed to him, and I handed him the letter. He called Muʿāwiyah, who read the letter to him. When he reached the part where dia berkata, 'You invite me to a Surga whose width is the heavens and the earth, so where is neraka?' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'When the night comes, where is the day?' Then dia berkata: 'I wrote to al-Najāshī and he tore it up, so Allāh tore him up with a tearing of his kingdom.' ʿAbbād berkata: aku berkata to Ibn Khuthaym, 'But had not al-Najāshī accepted Islam, and Rasulullah ﷺ announced his death in Madīnah to his para sahabat and prayed over him?' He berkata, 'Yes, that was so-and-so the son of so-and-so, and this was so-and-so the son of so-and-so,' and Ibn Khuthaym named them all, but I forgot them. 'And I wrote to Kisrā (Chosroes) a letter and he tore it to pieces, so Allāh tore him to pieces with a tearing of his kingdom. And I wrote to Caesar a letter and dia menjawab to me, and the people continued to fear might from them as long as there was good in life.' Then dia berkata to me, 'Who are you?' aku berkata, 'From Tanūkh.' He berkata, 'O brother of Tanūkh, would you like to accept Islam?' aku berkata, 'No. aku datang dari a people and I am among them upon a religion, and I tidak akan exchange their religion until I return to them.' He berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ laughed, or smiled. When I had concluded my business, I stood up, and when I turned to leave, he called me back and berkata, 'O brother of Tanūkh, come, go and carry out what you were commanded.' He berkata: I had forgotten it. So aku pergi around behind the circle, and he cast off a cloak that was on his back, and aku melihat the cartilage of his shoulder blade like a large cupping mark. ʿAbdullāh berkata: Abū ʿĀmir Ḥawthara ibn Ashras menceritakan kepadaku by dictation, dia berkata: Ḥammād ibn Salama mengabarkan kepadaku, dari ʿAbdullāh ibn ʿUthmān ibn Khuthaym, dari Saʿīd ibn Abī Rāshid, yang berkata: Caesar's messenger was my neighbor during the time of Yazīd ibn Muʿāwiyah. aku berkata to him, 'Tell me about the letter of Rasulullah ﷺ to Caesar.' He berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ sent Diḥyah al-Kalbī to Caesar and wrote a letter with him to him. Then dia menyebutkan the like of the ḥadīth of ʿAbbād ibn ʿAbbād, and the ḥadīth of ʿAbbād is more complete and better in its narration of the account. He added: Rasulullah ﷺ laughed when he invited him to Islam and he refused, and he recited this verse: {Indeed, you janganlah guide whom you like, but Allāh guides whom He wills} [28:56]. Then Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'You are the messenger of a people, and you have a right, but you have come to us while we are in hardship.' ʿUthmān ibn ʿAffān berkata, 'I will clothe him with a Ṣafūrī suit,' and a man dari the Anṣār berkata, 'I will host him.'
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي سُرَيْجُ بْنُ يُونُسَ مِنْ كِتَابِهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبَّادُ بْنُ عَبَّادٍ يَعْنِي الْمُهَلَّبِيَّ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ خُثَيْمٍ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي رَاشِدٍ مَوْلًى لِآلِ مُعَاوِيَةَ قَالَ قَدِمْتُ الشَّامَ فَقِيلَ لِي فِي هَذِهِ الْكَنِيسَةِ رَسُولُ قَيْصَرَ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ فَدَخَلْنَا الْكَنِيسَةَ فَإِذَا أَنَا بِشَيْخٍ كَبِيرٍ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ أَنْتَ رَسُولُ قَيْصَرَ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ قُلْتُ حَدِّثْنِي عَنْ ذَلِكَ قَالَ إِنَّهُ لَمَّا غَزَا تَبُوكَ كَتَبَ إِلَى قَيْصَرَ كِتَابًا وَبَعَثَ بِهِ مَعَ رَجُلٍ يُقَالُ لَهُ دِحْيَةُ بْنُ خَلِيفَةَ فَلَمَّا قَرَأَ كِتَابَهُ وَضَعَهُ مَعَهُ عَلَى سَرِيرِهِ وَبَعَثَ إِلَى بَطَارِقَتِهِ وَرُءُوسِ أَصْحَابِهِ فَقَالَ إِنَّ هَذَا الرَّجُلَ قَدْ بَعَثَ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا وَكَتَبَ إِلَيْكُمْ كِتَابًا يُخَيِّرُكُمْ إِحْدَى ثَلَاثٍ إِمَّا أَنْ تَتَّبِعُوهُ عَلَى دِينِهِ أَوْ تُقِرُّوا لَهُ بِخَرَاجٍ يَجْرِي لَهُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَيُقِرَّكُمْ عَلَى هَيْئَتِكُمْ فِي بِلَادِكُمْ أَوْ أَنْ تُلْقُوا إِلَيْهِ بِالْحَرْبِ قَالَ فَنَخَرُوا نَخْرَةً حَتَّى خَرَجَ بَعْضُهُمْ مِنْ بَرَانِسِهِمْ وَقَالُوا لَا نَتَّبِعُهُ عَلَى دِينِهِ وَنَدَعُ دِينَنَا وَدِينَ آبَائِنَا وَلَا نُقِرُّ لَهُ بِخَرَاجٍ يَجْرِي لَهُ عَلَيْنَا وَلَكِنْ نُلْقِي إِلَيْهِ الْحَرْبَ فَقَالَ قَدْ كَانَ ذَاكَ وَلَكِنِّي كَرِهْتُ أَنْ أَفْتَاتَ دُونَكُمْ بِأَمْرٍ قَالَ عَبَّادٌ فَقُلْتُ لِابْنِ خُثَيْمٍ أَوَلَيْسَ قَدْ كَانَ قَارَبَ وَهَمَّ بِالْإِسْلَامِ فِيمَا بَلَغَنَا قَالَ بَلَى لَوْلَا أَنَّهُ رَأَى مِنْهُمْ قَالَ فَقَالَ ابْغُونِي رَجُلًا مِنْ الْعَرَبِ أَكْتُبْ مَعَهُ إِلَيْهِ جَوَابَ كِتَابِهِ قَالَ فَأَتَيْتُ وَأَنَا شَابٌّ فَانْطُلِقَ بِي إِلَيْهِ فَكَتَبَ جَوَابَهُ وَقَالَ لِي مَهْمَا نَسِيتَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ فَاحْفَظْ عَنِّي ثَلَاثَ خِلَالٍ انْظُرْ إِذَا هُوَ قَرَأَ كِتَابِي هَلْ يَذْكُرُ اللَّيْلَ وَالنَّهَارَ وَهَلْ يَذْكُرُ كِتَابَهُ إِلَيَّ وَانْظُرْ هَلْ تَرَى فِي ظَهْرِهِ عَلَمًا قَالَ فَأَقْبَلْتُ حَتَّى أَتَيْتُهُ وَهُوَ بِتَبُوكَ فِي حَلْقَةٍ مِنْ أَصْحَابِهِ مُحْتَبِينَ فَسَأَلْتُ فَأُخْبِرْتُ بِهِ فَدَفَعْتُ إِلَيْهِ الْكِتَابَ فَدَعَا مُعَاوِيَةَ فَقَرَأَ عَلَيْهِ الْكِتَابَ فَلَمَّا أَتَى عَلَى قَوْلِهِ دَعَوْتَنِي إِلَى جَنَّةٍ عَرْضُهَا السَّمَوَاتُ وَالْأَرْضُ فَأَيْنَ النَّارُ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِذَا جَاءَ اللَّيْلُ فَأَيْنَ النَّهَارُ قَالَ فَقَالَ إِنِّي قَدْ كَتَبْتُ إِلَى النَّجَاشِيِّ فَخَرَّقَهُ فَخَرَّقَهُ اللَّهُ مُخَرَّقَ الْمُلْكِ قَالَ عَبَّادٌ فَقُلْتُ لِابْنِ خُثَيْمٍ أَلَيْسَ قَدْ أَسْلَمَ النَّجَاشِيُّ وَنَعَاهُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِالْمَدِينَةِ إِلَى أَصْحَابِهِ فَصَلَّى عَلَيْهِ قَالَ بَلَى ذَاكَ فُلَانُ بْنُ فُلَانٍ وَهَذَا فُلَانُ بْنُ فُلَانٍ قَدْ ذَكَرَهُمْ ابْنُ خُثَيْمٍ جَمِيعًا وَنَسِيتُهُمَا وَكَتَبْ
matn_ar: تُ إِلَى كِسْرَى كِتَابًا فَمَزَّقَهُ فَمَزَّقَهُ اللَّهُ تَمْزِيقَ الْمُلْكِ وَكَتَبْتُ إِلَى قَيْصَرَ كِتَابًا فَأَجَابَنِي فِيهِ فَلَمْ تَزَلْ النَّاسُ يَخْشَوْنَ مِنْهُمْ بَأْسًا مَا كَانَ فِي الْعَيْشِ خَيْرٌ ثُمَّ قَالَ لِي مَنْ أَنْتَ قُلْتُ مِنْ تَنُوخٍ قَالَ يَا أَخَا تَنُوخٍ هَلْ لَكَ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ قُلْتُ لَا إِنِّي أَقْبَلْتُ مِنْ قِبَلِ قَوْمٍ وَأَنَا فِيهِمْ عَلَى دِينٍ وَلَسْتُ مُسْتَبْدِلًا بِدِينِهِمْ حَتَّى أَرْجِعَ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ فَضَحِكَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَوْ تَبَسَّمَ فَلَمَّا قَضَيْتُ حَاجَتِي قُمْتُ فَلَمَّا وَلَّيْتُ دَعَانِي فَقَالَ يَا أَخَا تَنُوخٍ هَلُمَّ فَامْضِ لِلَّذِي أُمِرْتَ بِهِ قَالَ وَكُنْتُ قَدْ نَسِيتُهَا فَاسْتَدَرْتُ مِنْ وَرَاءِ الْحَلْقَةِ وَيَلْقَى بُرْدَةً كَانَتْ عَلَيْهِ عَنْ ظَهْرِهِ فَرَأَيْتُ غُضْرُوفَ كَتِفِهِ مِثْلَ الْمِحْجَمِ الضَّخْمِ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو عَامِرٍ حَوْثَرَةُ بْنُ أَشْرَسَ إِمْلَاءً عَلَىَّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ خُثَيْمٍ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي رَاشِدٍ قَالَ كَانَ رَسُولُ قَيْصَرَ جَارًا لِي زَمَنَ يَزِيدَ بْنِ مُعَاوِيَةَ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ أَخْبِرْنِي عَنْ كِتَابِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِلَى قَيْصَرَ فَقَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَرْسَلَ دِحْيَةَ الْكَلْبِيَّ إِلَى قَيْصَرَ وَكَتَبَ مَعَهُ إِلَيْهِ كِتَابًا فَذَكَرَ نَحْوَ حَدِيثِ عَبَّادِ بْنِ عَبَّادٍ وَحَدِيثُ عَبَّادٍ أَتَمُّ وَأَحْسَنُ اقْتِصَاصًا لِلْحَدِيثِ وَزَادَ قَالَ فَضَحِكَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ حِينَ دَعَاهُ إِلَى الْإِسْلَامِ فَأَبَى أَنْ يُسْلِمَ وَتَلَا هَذِهِ الْآيَةَ { إِنَّكَ لَا تَهْدِي مَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ وَلَكِنَّ اللَّهَ يَهْدِي مَنْ يَشَاءُ } ثُمَّ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِنَّكَ رَسُولُ قَوْمٍ وَإِنَّ لَكَ حَقًّا وَلَكِنْ جِئْتَنَا وَنَحْنُ مُرْمِلُونَ فَقَالَ عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عَفَّانَ أَنَا أَكْسُوهُ حُلَّةً صَفُورِيَّةً وَقَالَ رَجُلٌ مِنْ الْأَنْصَارِ عَلَيَّ ضِيَافَتُهُ
matn_ar_clean: ت إلى كسرى كتابا فمزقه فمزقه الله تمزيق الملك وكتبت إلى قيصر كتابا فأجابني فيه فلم تزل الناس يخشون منهم بأسا ما كان في العيش خير ثم قال لي من أنت قلت من تنوخ قال يا أخا تنوخ هل لك في الإسلام قلت لا إني أقبلت من قبل قوم وأنا فيهم على دين ولست مستبدلا بدينهم حتى أرجع إليهم قال فضحك رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم أو تبسم فلما قضيت حاجتي قمت فلما وليت دعاني فقال يا أخا تنوخ هلم فامض للذي أمرت به قال وكنت قد نسيتها فاستدرت من وراء الحلقة ويلقى بردة كانت عليه عن ظهره فرأيت غضروف كتفه مثل المحجم الضخم حدثنا عبد الله قال حدثني أبو عامر حوثرة بن أشرس إملاء على قال أخبرني حماد بن سلمة عن عبد الله بن عثمان بن خثيم عن سعيد بن أبي راشد قال كان رسول قيصر جارا لي زمن يزيد بن معاوية فقلت له أخبرني عن كتاب رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم إلى قيصر فقال إن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم أرسل دحية الكلبي إلى قيصر وكتب معه إليه كتابا فذكر نحو حديث عباد بن عباد وحديث عباد أتم وأحسن اقتصاصا للحديث وزاد قال فضحك رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم حين دعاه إلى الإسلام فأبى أن يسلم وتلا هذه الآية { إنك لا تهدي من أحببت ولكن الله يهدي من يشاء } ثم قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم إنك رسول قوم وإن لك حقا ولكن جئتنا ونحن مرملون فقال عثمان بن عفان أنا أكسوه حلة صفورية وقال رجل من الأنصار علي ضيافته

isnad_chain.name_ar: عبد الله بن عثمان بن خثيم

iwh_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: Surayj ibn Yūnus narrated to me from his book, he said: ʿAbbād ibn ʿAbbād, meaning al-Muhallabī, narrated to us, from ʿAbdullāh ibn ʿUthmān ibn Khuthaym, from Saʿīd ibn Abī Rāshid, a freed slave of the family of Muʿāwiyah, who said: I came to Shām, and it was said to me, 'In this church is the messenger of Caesar to the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ.' So I entered the church, and there was an elderly man. I said to him, 'Are you the messenger of Caesar to the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ?' He said, 'Yes.' I said, 'Tell me about that.' He said: When he ﷺ was campaigning at Tabūk, he wrote a letter to Caesar and sent it with a man called Diḥyah ibn Khalīfah. When Caesar read his letter, he placed it with him on his couch and sent for his patricians and the heads of his companions. He said, 'This man has sent you a messenger and written you a letter offering you one of three choices: either you follow him in his religion, or you pay him a tribute that he levies upon you while he leaves you in your state in your lands, or you wage war against him.' They snorted so fiercely that some of them nearly burst from their cloaks, and they said, 'We will not follow him in his religion and abandon our religion and the religion of our fathers, and we will not pay him a tribute levied upon us. Rather, we will wage war against him.' He said, 'That was indeed so, but I disliked acting on a matter without consulting you.' ʿAbbād said: I said to Ibn Khuthaym, 'Had he not come close and intended to accept Islam, as has reached us?' He said, 'Yes, were it not for what he saw from them.' He then said, 'Find me a man from the Arabs so that I may write with him a reply to his letter.' He said: So I was brought, being a young man, and taken to him. He wrote his reply and said to me, 'Whatever else you may forget, remember three things from me: Look when he reads my letter, does he mention the night and the day? Does he mention his letter to me? And look whether you see on his back a mark.' He said: So I set out until I came to him at Tabūk, in a circle of his Companions sitting with their knees drawn up. I asked and was directed to him, and I handed him the letter. He called Muʿāwiyah, who read the letter to him. When he reached the part where he said, 'You invite me to a Paradise whose width is the heavens and the earth, so where is the Fire?' The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ said: 'When the night comes, where is the day?' Then he said: 'I wrote to al-Najāshī and he tore it up, so Allāh tore him up with a tearing of his kingdom.' ʿAbbād said: I said to Ibn Khuthaym, 'But had not al-Najāshī accepted Islam, and the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ announced his death in Madīnah to his Companions and prayed over him?' He said, 'Yes, that was so-and-so the son of so-and-so, and this was so-and-so the son of so-and-so,' and Ibn Khuthaym named them all, but I forgot them. 'And I wrote to Kisrā (Chosroes) a letter and he tore it to pieces, so Allāh tore him to pieces with a tearing of his kingdom. And I wrote to Caesar a letter and he replied to me, and the people continued to fear might from them as long as there was good in life.' Then he said to me, 'Who are you?' I said, 'From Tanūkh.' He said, 'O brother of Tanūkh, would you like to accept Islam?' I said, 'No. I came from a people and I am among them upon a religion, and I will not exchange their religion until I return to them.' He said: The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ laughed, or smiled. When I had concluded my business, I stood up, and when I turned to leave, he called me back and said, 'O brother of Tanūkh, come, go and carry out what you were commanded.' He said: I had forgotten it. So I went around behind the circle, and he cast off a cloak that was on his back, and I saw the cartilage of his shoulder blade like a large cupping mark. ʿAbdullāh said: Abū ʿĀmir Ḥawthara ibn Ashras narrated to me by dictation, he said: Ḥammād ibn Salama informed me, from ʿAbdullāh ibn ʿUthmān ibn Khuthaym, from Saʿīd ibn Abī Rāshid, who said: Caesar's messenger was my neighbor during the time of Yazīd ibn Muʿāwiyah. I said to him, 'Tell me about the letter of the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ to Caesar.' He said: The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ sent Diḥyah al-Kalbī to Caesar and wrote a letter with him to him. Then he mentioned the like of the ḥadīth of ʿAbbād ibn ʿAbbād, and the ḥadīth of ʿAbbād is more complete and better in its narration of the account. He added: The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ laughed when he invited him to Islam and he refused, and he recited this verse: {Indeed, you do not guide whom you like, but Allāh guides whom He wills} [28:56]. Then the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ said: 'You are the messenger of a people, and you have a right, but you have come to us while we are in hardship.' ʿUthmān ibn ʿAffān said, 'I will clothe him with a Ṣafūrī suit,' and a man from the Anṣār said, 'I will host him.'

ar: ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَكْرٍ الْبُرْسَانِيُّ ‏ ‏قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا ‏ ‏عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَبِي زِيَادٍ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ كَثِيرٍ الدَّارِيُّ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏مُجَاهِدٍ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏شَيْخٌ أَدْرَكَ الْجَاهِلِيَّةَ وَنَحْنُ فِي غَزْوَةِ ‏ ‏رُودِسَ ‏ ‏يُقَالُ لَهُ ‏ ‏ابْنُ عَبْسٍ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏كُنْتُ أَسُوقُ لِآلٍ لَنَا بَقَرَةً قَالَ فَسَمِعْتُ مِنْ جَوْفِهَا يَا آلَ ‏ ‏ذَرِيحٍ ‏ ‏قَوْلٌ فَصِيحٌ ‏ ‏رَجُلٌ يَصِيحُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ قَالَ فَقَدِمْنَا ‏ ‏مَكَّةَ ‏ ‏فَوَجَدْنَا النَّبِيَّ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏قَدْ خَرَجَ ‏ ‏بِمَكَّةَ ‏
ar_clean: قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَكْرٍ الْبُرْسَانِيُّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَبِي زِيَادٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ كَثِيرٍ الدَّارِيُّ عَنْ مُجَاهِدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شَيْخٌ أَدْرَكَ الْجَاهِلِيَّةَ وَنَحْنُ فِي غَزْوَةِ رُودِسَ يُقَالُ لَهُ ابْنُ عَبْسٍ قَالَ كُنْتُ أَسُوقُ لِآلٍ لَنَا بَقَرَةً قَالَ فَسَمِعْتُ مِنْ جَوْفِهَا يَا آلَ ذَرِيحٍ قَوْلٌ فَصِيحٌ رَجُلٌ يَصِيحُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ قَالَ فَقَدِمْنَا مَكَّةَ فَوَجَدْنَا النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَدْ خَرَجَ بِمَكَّةَ
sunnah_ref_en: Muḥammad ibn Bakr al-Bursānī narrated to us, he said: ʿUbaydullāh ibn Abī Ziyād informed us, he said: ʿAbdullāh ibn Kathīr al-Dārī narrated to me, from Mujāhid, who said: A shaykh who lived in the Jāhiliyyah narrated to us while we were on the expedition of Rhodes, called Ibn ʿAbs. He said: I used to tend a cow belonging to a family of ours, and I heard from its belly: 'O family of Dharīḥ! A clear statement! A man calling out: there is no god but Allāh.' He said: So we came to Makkah and found that the Prophet ﷺ had emerged in Makkah.
iwh_id: Muḥammad ibn Bakr al-Bursānī menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: ʿUbaydullāh ibn Abī Ziyād mengabarkan kepada kami, dia berkata: ʿAbdullāh ibn Kathīr al-Dārī menceritakan kepadaku, dari Mujāhid, yang berkata: A shaykh who lived in the Jāhiliyyah menceritakan kepada kami while we were on the expedition of Rhodes, called Ibn ʿAbs. He berkata: I biasa tend a cow belonging to a family of ours, and aku mendengar from its belly: 'O family of Dharīḥ! A clear statement! A man calling out: there is no god but Allāh.' He berkata: So we came to Makkah and found bahwa Nabi ﷺ had emerged in Makkah.
isnad_ar: قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَكْرٍ الْبُرْسَانِيُّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَبِي زِيَادٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ كَثِيرٍ الدَّارِيُّ عَنْ مُجَاهِدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شَيْخٌ أَدْرَكَ الْجَاهِلِيَّةَ وَنَحْنُ فِي غَزْوَةِ رُودِسَ
matn_ar: يُقَالُ لَهُ ابْنُ عَبْسٍ قَالَ كُنْتُ أَسُوقُ لِآلٍ لَنَا بَقَرَةً قَالَ فَسَمِعْتُ مِنْ جَوْفِهَا يَا آلَ ذَرِيحٍ قَوْلٌ فَصِيحٌ رَجُلٌ يَصِيحُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ قَالَ فَقَدِمْنَا مَكَّةَ فَوَجَدْنَا النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَدْ خَرَجَ بِمَكَّةَ
matn_ar_clean: يقال له ابن عبس قال كنت أسوق لآل لنا بقرة قال فسمعت من جوفها يا آل ذريح قول فصيح رجل يصيح لا إله إلا الله قال فقدمنا مكة فوجدنا النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قد خرج بمكة
iwh_en: Muḥammad ibn Bakr al-Bursānī narrated to us, he said: ʿUbaydullāh ibn Abī Ziyād informed us, he said: ʿAbdullāh ibn Kathīr al-Dārī narrated to me, from Mujāhid, who said: A shaykh who lived in the Jāhiliyyah narrated to us while we were on the expedition of Rhodes, called Ibn ʿAbs. He said: I used to tend a cow belonging to a family of ours, and I heard from its belly: 'O family of Dharīḥ! A clear statement! A man calling out: there is no god but Allāh.' He said: So we came to Makkah and found that the Prophet ﷺ had emerged in Makkah.

ar: ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنْزِيُّ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْدُ الصَّمَدِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْوَارِثِ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏سَكَنُ بْنُ الْمُغِيرَةِ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏الْوَلِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي هِشَامٍ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏فَرْقَدٍ أَبِي طَلْحَةَ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ خَبَّابٍ السُّلَمِيِّ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏خَرَجَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏فَحَثَّ عَلَى جَيْشِ الْعُسْرَةِ فَقَالَ ‏ ‏عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عَفَّانَ ‏ ‏عَلَيَّ مِائَةُ بَعِيرٍ ‏ ‏بِأَحْلَاسِهَا ‏ ‏وَأَقْتَابِهَا ‏ ‏قَالَ ثُمَّ حَثَّ فَقَالَ ‏ ‏عُثْمَانُ ‏ ‏عَلَيَّ مِائَةٌ أُخْرَى ‏ ‏بِأَحْلَاسِهَا ‏ ‏وَأَقْتَابِهَا ‏ ‏قَالَ ثُمَّ نَزَلَ مَرْقَاةً مِنْ الْمِنْبَرِ ثُمَّ حَثَّ فَقَالَ ‏ ‏عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عَفَّانَ ‏ ‏عَلَيَّ مِائَةٌ أُخْرَى ‏ ‏بِأَحْلَاسِهَا ‏ ‏وَأَقْتَابِهَا ‏ ‏قَالَ فَرَأَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏يَقُولُ بِيَدِهِ هَكَذَا يُحَرِّكُهَا ‏ ‏وَأَخْرَجَ ‏ ‏عَبْدُ الصَّمَدِ ‏ ‏يَدَهُ كَالْمُتَعَجِّبِ مَا عَلَى ‏ ‏عُثْمَانَ ‏ ‏مَا عَمِلَ بَعْدَ هَذَا ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنَزِيُّ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عُمَرَ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏سَكَنُ بْنُ الْمُغِيرَةِ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏الْوَلِيدُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏أَبِي طَلْحَةَ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ خَبَّابٍ السُّلَمِيِّ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏خَطَبَ فَحَضَّ عَلَى جَيْشِ الْعُسْرَةِ ‏ ‏فَذَكَرَهُ ‏
ar_clean: قَالَ عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنْزِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الصَّمَدِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْوَارِثِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي سَكَنُ بْنُ الْمُغِيرَةِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي الْوَلِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي هِشَامٍ عَنْ فَرْقَدٍ أَبِي طَلْحَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ خَبَّابٍ السُّلَمِيِّ قَالَ خَرَجَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَحَثَّ عَلَى جَيْشِ الْعُسْرَةِ فَقَالَ عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عَفَّانَ عَلَيَّ مِائَةُ بَعِيرٍ بِأَحْلَاسِهَا وَأَقْتَابِهَا قَالَ ثُمَّ حَثَّ فَقَالَ عُثْمَانُ عَلَيَّ مِائَةٌ أُخْرَى بِأَحْلَاسِهَا وَأَقْتَابِهَا قَالَ ثُمَّ نَزَلَ مَرْقَاةً مِنْ الْمِنْبَرِ ثُمَّ حَثَّ فَقَالَ عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عَفَّانَ عَلَيَّ مِائَةٌ أُخْرَى بِأَحْلَاسِهَا وَأَقْتَابِهَا قَالَ فَرَأَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ بِيَدِهِ هَكَذَا يُحَرِّكُهَا وَأَخْرَجَ عَبْدُ الصَّمَدِ يَدَهُ كَالْمُتَعَجِّبِ مَا عَلَى عُثْمَانَ مَا عَمِلَ بَعْدَ هَذَا قَالَ عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنَزِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عُمَرَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَكَنُ بْنُ الْمُغِيرَةِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْوَلِيدُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ عَنْ أَبِي طَلْحَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ خَبَّابٍ السُّلَمِيِّ قَالَ رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ خَطَبَ فَحَضَّ عَلَى جَيْشِ الْعُسْرَةِ فَذَكَرَهُ
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbdullāh said: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī narrated to me, he said: ʿAbd al-Ṣamad ibn ʿAbd al-Wārith narrated to us, he said: Sakan ibn al-Mughīrah narrated to me, he said: al-Walīd ibn Abī Hishām narrated to me, from Farqad Abū Ṭalḥah, from ʿAbd al-Raḥmān ibn Khabbāb al-Sulamī, who said: The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ came out and urged the outfitting of the Army of Hardship (Tabūk). ʿUthmān ibn ʿAffān said, 'I pledge one hundred camels with their saddle-blankets and pack-saddles.' Then he urged again, and ʿUthmān said, 'I pledge another one hundred with their saddle-blankets and pack-saddles.' Then he descended a step from the pulpit and urged again, and ʿUthmān ibn ʿAffān said, 'I pledge another one hundred with their saddle-blankets and pack-saddles.' I saw the Prophet ﷺ moving his hand like this, gesturing. ʿAbd al-Ṣamad extended his hand in astonishment, saying: 'Nothing ʿUthmān does after this can harm him. Nothing ʿUthmān does after this can harm him.' ʿAbdullāh said: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī narrated to me, he said: ʿUthmān ibn ʿUmar narrated to us, he said: Sakan ibn al-Mughīrah narrated to us, he said: al-Walīd ibn Hishām narrated to us, from Abū Ṭalḥah, from ʿAbd al-Raḥmān ibn Khabbāb al-Sulamī, who said: I saw the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ deliver a sermon urging the Army of Hardship, and he mentioned the same.
iwh_id: ʿAbdullāh berkata: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: ʿAbd al-Ṣamad ibn ʿAbd al-Wārith menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Sakan ibn al-Mughīrah menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: al-Walīd ibn Abī Hishām menceritakan kepadaku, dari Farqad Abū Ṭalḥah, dari ʿAbd al-Raḥmān ibn Khabbāb al-Sulamī, yang berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ came out and urged the outfitting of the Army of Hardship (Tabūk). ʿUthmān ibn ʿAffān berkata, 'I pledge one hundred camels with their saddle-blankets and pack-saddles.' Then he urged again, and ʿUthmān berkata, 'I pledge another one hundred with their saddle-blankets and pack-saddles.' Then he descended a step dari the pulpit and urged again, and ʿUthmān ibn ʿAffān berkata, 'I pledge another one hundred with their saddle-blankets and pack-saddles.' aku melihat Nabi ﷺ moving his hand like this, gesturing. ʿAbd al-Ṣamad extended his hand in astonishment, seraya berkata: 'Nothing ʿUthmān does after this can harm him. Nothing ʿUthmān does after this can harm him.' ʿAbdullāh berkata: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: ʿUthmān ibn ʿUmar menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Sakan ibn al-Mughīrah menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: al-Walīd ibn Hishām menceritakan kepada kami, dari Abū Ṭalḥah, dari ʿAbd al-Raḥmān ibn Khabbāb al-Sulamī, yang berkata: aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ deliver a sermon urging the Army of Hardship, and dia menyebutkan the same.
isnad_ar: قَالَ عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنْزِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الصَّمَدِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْوَارِثِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي سَكَنُ بْنُ الْمُغِيرَةِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي الْوَلِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي هِشَامٍ عَنْ فَرْقَدٍ أَبِي طَلْحَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ خَبَّابٍ السُّلَمِيِّ قَالَ خَرَجَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَحَثَّ عَلَى جَيْشِ الْعُسْرَةِ فَقَالَ عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عَفَّانَ عَلَيَّ مِائَةُ بَعِيرٍ بِأَحْلَاسِهَا وَأَقْتَابِهَا قَالَ ثُمَّ حَثَّ فَقَالَ عُثْمَانُ عَلَيَّ مِائَةٌ أُخْرَى بِأَحْلَاسِهَا وَأَقْتَابِهَا قَالَ ثُمَّ نَزَلَ مَرْقَاةً مِنْ الْمِنْبَرِ ثُمَّ حَثَّ فَقَالَ عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عَفَّانَ عَلَيَّ مِائَةٌ أُخْرَى بِأَحْل
matn_ar: َاسِهَا وَأَقْتَابِهَا قَالَ فَرَأَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ بِيَدِهِ هَكَذَا يُحَرِّكُهَا وَأَخْرَجَ عَبْدُ الصَّمَدِ يَدَهُ كَالْمُتَعَجِّبِ مَا عَلَى عُثْمَانَ مَا عَمِلَ بَعْدَ هَذَا قَالَ عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنَزِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عُمَرَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَكَنُ بْنُ الْمُغِيرَةِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْوَلِيدُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ عَنْ أَبِي طَلْحَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ خَبَّابٍ السُّلَمِيِّ قَالَ رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ خَطَبَ فَحَضَّ عَلَى جَيْشِ الْعُسْرَةِ فَذَكَرَهُ
matn_ar_clean: اسها وأقتابها قال فرأيت النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم يقول بيده هكذا يحركها وأخرج عبد الصمد يده كالمتعجب ما على عثمان ما عمل بعد هذا قال عبد الله حدثني أبو موسى العنزي قال حدثنا عثمان بن عمر قال حدثنا سكن بن المغيرة قال حدثنا الوليد بن هشام عن أبي طلحة عن عبد الرحمن بن خباب السلمي قال رأيت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم خطب فحض على جيش العسرة فذكره
iwh_en: ʿAbdullāh said: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī narrated to me, he said: ʿAbd al-Ṣamad ibn ʿAbd al-Wārith narrated to us, he said: Sakan ibn al-Mughīrah narrated to me, he said: al-Walīd ibn Abī Hishām narrated to me, from Farqad Abū Ṭalḥah, from ʿAbd al-Raḥmān ibn Khabbāb al-Sulamī, who said: The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ came out and urged the outfitting of the Army of Hardship (Tabūk). ʿUthmān ibn ʿAffān said, 'I pledge one hundred camels with their saddle-blankets and pack-saddles.' Then he urged again, and ʿUthmān said, 'I pledge another one hundred with their saddle-blankets and pack-saddles.' Then he descended a step from the pulpit and urged again, and ʿUthmān ibn ʿAffān said, 'I pledge another one hundred with their saddle-blankets and pack-saddles.' I saw the Prophet ﷺ moving his hand like this, gesturing. ʿAbd al-Ṣamad extended his hand in astonishment, saying: 'Nothing ʿUthmān does after this can harm him. Nothing ʿUthmān does after this can harm him.' ʿAbdullāh said: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī narrated to me, he said: ʿUthmān ibn ʿUmar narrated to us, he said: Sakan ibn al-Mughīrah narrated to us, he said: al-Walīd ibn Hishām narrated to us, from Abū Ṭalḥah, from ʿAbd al-Raḥmān ibn Khabbāb al-Sulamī, who said: I saw the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ deliver a sermon urging the Army of Hardship, and he mentioned the same.

ar: ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنَزِيُّ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ ‏ ‏عَنِ ‏ ‏ابْنِ عَوْنٍ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏كُلْثُومِ بْنِ جَبْرٍ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏كُنَّا ‏ ‏بِوَاسِطِ الْقَصَبِ ‏ ‏عِنْدَ ‏ ‏عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ ‏ ‏قَالَ فَإِذَا عِنْدَهُ رَجُلٌ يُقَالُ لَهُ ‏ ‏أَبُو الْغَادِيَةِ ‏ ‏اسْتَسْقَى مَاءً فَأُتِيَ بِإِنَاءٍ مُفَضَّضٍ فَأَبَى أَنْ يَشْرَبَ وَذَكَرَ النَّبِيَّ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏فَذَكَرَ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ ‏ ‏لَا تَرْجِعُوا بَعْدِي كُفَّارًا ‏ ‏أَوْ ضُلَّالًا شَكَّ ‏ ‏ابْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ ‏ ‏يَضْرِبُ بَعْضُكُمْ رِقَابَ بَعْضٍ فَإِذَا رَجُلٌ يَسُبُّ فُلَانًا فَقُلْتُ وَاللَّهِ لَئِنْ أَمْكَنَنِي اللَّهُ مِنْكَ فِي ‏ ‏كَتِيبَةٍ ‏ ‏فَلَمَّا كَانَ يَوْمُ ‏ ‏صِفِّينَ ‏ ‏إِذَا أَنَا بِهِ وَعَلَيْهِ ‏ ‏دِرْعٌ ‏ ‏قَالَ فَفَطِنْتُ إِلَى الْفُرْجَةِ فِي جُرُبَّانِ ‏ ‏الدِّرْعِ ‏ ‏فَطَعَنْتُهُ فَقَتَلْتُهُ فَإِذَا هُوَ ‏ ‏عَمَّارُ بْنُ يَاسِرٍ ‏ ‏قَالَ قُلْتُ وَأَيَّ يَدٍ ‏ ‏كَفَتَاهُ ‏ ‏يَكْرَهُ أَنْ يَشْرَبَ فِي إِنَاءٍ ‏ ‏مُفَضَّضٍ ‏ ‏وَقَدْ قَتَلَ ‏ ‏عَمَّارَ بْنَ يَاسِرٍ ‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنَزِيُّ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنْ كُلْثُومِ بْنِ جَبْرٍ قَالَ كُنَّا بِوَاسِطِ الْقَصَبِ عِنْدَ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ قَالَ فَإِذَا عِنْدَهُ رَجُلٌ يُقَالُ لَهُ أَبُو الْغَادِيَةِ اسْتَسْقَى مَاءً فَأُتِيَ بِإِنَاءٍ مُفَضَّضٍ فَأَبَى أَنْ يَشْرَبَ وَذَكَرَ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَذَكَرَ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ لَا تَرْجِعُوا بَعْدِي كُفَّارًا أَوْ ضُلَّالًا شَكَّ ابْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ يَضْرِبُ بَعْضُكُمْ رِقَابَ بَعْضٍ فَإِذَا رَجُلٌ يَسُبُّ فُلَانًا فَقُلْتُ وَاللَّهِ لَئِنْ أَمْكَنَنِي اللَّهُ مِنْكَ فِي كَتِيبَةٍ فَلَمَّا كَانَ يَوْمُ صِفِّينَ إِذَا أَنَا بِهِ وَعَلَيْهِ دِرْعٌ قَالَ فَفَطِنْتُ إِلَى الْفُرْجَةِ فِي جُرُبَّانِ الدِّرْعِ فَطَعَنْتُهُ فَقَتَلْتُهُ فَإِذَا هُوَ عَمَّارُ بْنُ يَاسِرٍ قَالَ قُلْتُ وَأَيَّ يَدٍ كَفَتَاهُ يَكْرَهُ أَنْ يَشْرَبَ فِي إِنَاءٍ مُفَضَّضٍ وَقَدْ قَتَلَ عَمَّارَ بْنَ يَاسِرٍ
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī Muḥammad ibn al-Muthannā narrated to me, he said: Muḥammad ibn Abī ʿAdī narrated to us, from Ibn ʿAwn, from Kulthūm ibn Jabr, who said: We were at Wāsiṭ al-Qaṣab with ʿAbd al-Aʿlā ibn ʿAbdillāh ibn ʿĀmir, and there was a man called Abū al-Ghādiyah. He asked for water to drink, and he was brought a silver-plated vessel, He refused to drink from it and mentioned the Prophet ﷺ, then narrated this ḥadīth: 'Do not revert after me as disbelievers' — or 'as misguided ones' (Ibn Abī ʿAdī was uncertain) — 'striking one another's necks.' Then there was a man insulting so-and-so. I said, 'By Allāh, if Allāh enables me to get to you in a military unit...' Then on the Day of Ṣiffīn, there he was wearing armor. I noticed the gap at the collar of the armor, so I thrust at him and killed him. And it turned out to be ʿAmmār ibn Yāsir. He said: I said, 'What hands these were!' — he refuses to drink from a silver-plated vessel, yet he killed ʿAmmār ibn Yāsir.
iwh_id: ʿAbdullāh menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī Muḥammad ibn al-Muthannā menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: Muḥammad ibn Abī ʿAdī menceritakan kepada kami, dari Ibn ʿAwn, dari Kulthūm ibn Jabr, yang berkata: We were at Wāsiṭ al-Qaṣab with ʿAbd al-Aʿlā ibn ʿAbdillāh ibn ʿĀmir, and there was a man called Abū al-Ghādiyah. He asked for water to drink, and he was brought a silver-plated vessel, He refused to drink from it and mentioned Nabi ﷺ, then meriwayatkan this ḥadīth: 'Janganlah revert after me as disbelievers' — or 'as misguided ones' (Ibn Abī ʿAdī was uncertain) — 'striking one another's necks.' Then there was a man insulting so-and-so. aku berkata, 'By Allāh, if Allāh enables me to get to you in a military unit...' Then on the Day of Ṣiffīn, there he was wearing armor. I noticed the gap at the collar of the armor, so I thrust at him and killed him. And it turned out to be ʿAmmār ibn Yāsir. He berkata: aku berkata, 'What hands these were!' — he refuses to drink dari a silver-plated vessel, yet he killed ʿAmmār ibn Yāsir.
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنَزِيُّ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنْ كُلْثُومِ بْنِ جَبْرٍ قَالَ كُنَّا بِوَاسِطِ الْقَصَبِ عِنْدَ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ قَالَ فَإِذَا عِنْدَهُ رَجُلٌ يُقَالُ لَهُ أَبُو الْغَادِيَةِ اسْتَسْقَى مَاءً فَأُتِيَ بِإِنَاءٍ مُفَضَّضٍ فَأَبَى أَنْ يَشْرَبَ وَذَكَرَ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَذَكَرَ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ لَا تَرْجِعُوا بَعْدِي كُفَّارًا أَ
matn_ar: وْ ضُلَّالًا شَكَّ ابْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ يَضْرِبُ بَعْضُكُمْ رِقَابَ بَعْضٍ فَإِذَا رَجُلٌ يَسُبُّ فُلَانًا فَقُلْتُ وَاللَّهِ لَئِنْ أَمْكَنَنِي اللَّهُ مِنْكَ فِي كَتِيبَةٍ فَلَمَّا كَانَ يَوْمُ صِفِّينَ إِذَا أَنَا بِهِ وَعَلَيْهِ دِرْعٌ قَالَ فَفَطِنْتُ إِلَى الْفُرْجَةِ فِي جُرُبَّانِ الدِّرْعِ فَطَعَنْتُهُ فَقَتَلْتُهُ فَإِذَا هُوَ عَمَّارُ بْنُ يَاسِرٍ قَالَ قُلْتُ وَأَيَّ يَدٍ كَفَتَاهُ يَكْرَهُ أَنْ يَشْرَبَ فِي إِنَاءٍ مُفَضَّضٍ وَقَدْ قَتَلَ عَمَّارَ بْنَ يَاسِرٍ
matn_ar_clean: و ضلالا شك ابن أبي عدي يضرب بعضكم رقاب بعض فإذا رجل يسب فلانا فقلت والله لئن أمكنني الله منك في كتيبة فلما كان يوم صفين إذا أنا به وعليه درع قال ففطنت إلى الفرجة في جربان الدرع فطعنته فقتلته فإذا هو عمار بن ياسر قال قلت وأي يد كفتاه يكره أن يشرب في إناء مفضض وقد قتل عمار بن ياسر

isnad_chain.name_ar: أبو موسى العنزي محمد بن المثنى

iwh_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī Muḥammad ibn al-Muthannā narrated to me, he said: Muḥammad ibn Abī ʿAdī narrated to us, from Ibn ʿAwn, from Kulthūm ibn Jabr, who said: We were at Wāsiṭ al-Qaṣab with ʿAbd al-Aʿlā ibn ʿAbdillāh ibn ʿĀmir, and there was a man called Abū al-Ghādiyah. He asked for water to drink, and he was brought a silver-plated vessel, He refused to drink from it and mentioned the Prophet ﷺ, then narrated this ḥadīth: 'Do not revert after me as disbelievers' — or 'as misguided ones' (Ibn Abī ʿAdī was uncertain) — 'striking one another's necks.' Then there was a man insulting so-and-so. I said, 'By Allāh, if Allāh enables me to get to you in a military unit...' Then on the Day of Ṣiffīn, there he was wearing armor. I noticed the gap at the collar of the armor, so I thrust at him and killed him. And it turned out to be ʿAmmār ibn Yāsir. He said: I said, 'What hands these were!' — he refuses to drink from a silver-plated vessel, yet he killed ʿAmmār ibn Yāsir.

ar: ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْدُ الصَّمَدِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْوَارِثِ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏رَبِيعَةُ بْنُ كُلْثُومٍ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏أَبِي ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏أَبِي غَادِيَةَ الْجُهَنِيِّ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏خَطَبَنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏يَوْمَ ‏ ‏الْعَقَبَةِ ‏ ‏فَقَالَ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ ‏ ‏إِنَّ دِمَاءَكُمْ وَأَمْوَالَكُمْ عَلَيْكُمْ حَرَامٌ إِلَى أَنْ تَلْقَوْا رَبَّكُمْ كَحُرْمَةِ يَوْمِكُمْ هَذَا فِي بَلَدِكُمْ هَذَا فِي شَهْرِكُمْ هَذَا أَلَا هَلْ بَلَّغْتُ قَالُوا نَعَمْ قَالَ اللَّهُمَّ هَلْ بَلَّغْتُ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَفَّانُ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏رَبِيعَةُ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏أَبِي ‏ ‏قَالَ سَمِعْتُ ‏ ‏أَبَا غَادِيَةَ الْجُهَنِيَّ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏بَايَعْتُ ‏ ‏رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏يَوْمَ ‏ ‏الْعَقَبَةِ ‏ ‏فَقَالَ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّ دِمَاءَكُمْ ‏ ‏فَذَكَرَ مِثْلَهُ ‏
ar_clean: قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الصَّمَدِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْوَارِثِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا رَبِيعَةُ بْنُ كُلْثُومٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ أَبِي غَادِيَةَ الْجُهَنِيِّ قَالَ خَطَبَنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَوْمَ الْعَقَبَةِ فَقَالَ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّ دِمَاءَكُمْ وَأَمْوَالَكُمْ عَلَيْكُمْ حَرَامٌ إِلَى أَنْ تَلْقَوْا رَبَّكُمْ كَحُرْمَةِ يَوْمِكُمْ هَذَا فِي بَلَدِكُمْ هَذَا فِي شَهْرِكُمْ هَذَا أَلَا هَلْ بَلَّغْتُ قَالُوا نَعَمْ قَالَ اللَّهُمَّ هَلْ بَلَّغْتُ حَدَّثَنَا عَفَّانُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي رَبِيعَةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا غَادِيَةَ الْجُهَنِيَّ قَالَ بَايَعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَوْمَ الْعَقَبَةِ فَقَالَ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّ دِمَاءَكُمْ فَذَكَرَ مِثْلَهُ
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbd al-Ṣamad ibn ʿAbd al-Wārith narrated to us, he said: Rabīʿah ibn Kulthūm narrated to us, he said: My father narrated to me, from Abū Ghādiyah al-Juhanī, who said: The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ addressed us on the Day of ʿAqabah and said: 'O people, your blood and your wealth are sacred to you until you meet your Lord, as sacred as this day of yours, in this land of yours, in this month of yours. Have I conveyed?' They said, 'Yes.' He said, 'O Allāh, have I conveyed?' ʿAffān narrated to us, he said: Rabīʿah narrated to me, he said: My father narrated to me, he said: I heard Abū Ghādiyah al-Juhanī say: I pledged allegiance to the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ on the Day of ʿAqabah, and he said, 'O people, your blood...' and he mentioned the like of it.
iwh_id: ʿAbd al-Ṣamad ibn ʿAbd al-Wārith menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Rabīʿah ibn Kulthūm menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: My father menceritakan kepadaku, dari Abū Ghādiyah al-Juhanī, yang berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ addressed us on the Day of ʿAqabah and berkata: 'O people, your blood and your wealth are sacred to you until you meet your Lord, as sacred as this day of yours, in this land of yours, in this month of yours. Have I conveyed?' They berkata, 'Yes.' He berkata, 'O Allāh, have I conveyed?' ʿAffān menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Rabīʿah menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: My father menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: aku mendengar Abū Ghādiyah al-Juhanī say: I pledged allegiance to Rasulullah ﷺ on the Day of ʿAqabah, and dia berkata, 'O people, your blood...' and dia menyebutkan the like of it.
isnad_ar: قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الصَّمَدِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْوَارِثِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا رَبِيعَةُ بْنُ كُلْثُومٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ أَبِي غَادِيَةَ الْجُهَنِيِّ قَالَ خَطَبَنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَوْمَ الْعَقَبَةِ فَقَالَ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّ دِمَاءَكُمْ وَأَمْوَالَكُمْ عَلَيْكُمْ حَرَامٌ إِلَى أَنْ تَلْقَوْا رَبَّكُمْ كَحُرْمَةِ يَوْمِكُمْ هَذَا فِي بَلَدِكُمْ هَذَا فِي شَ
matn_ar: هْرِكُمْ هَذَا أَلَا هَلْ بَلَّغْتُ قَالُوا نَعَمْ قَالَ اللَّهُمَّ هَلْ بَلَّغْتُ حَدَّثَنَا عَفَّانُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي رَبِيعَةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا غَادِيَةَ الْجُهَنِيَّ قَالَ بَايَعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَوْمَ الْعَقَبَةِ فَقَالَ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّ دِمَاءَكُمْ فَذَكَرَ مِثْلَهُ
matn_ar_clean: هركم هذا ألا هل بلغت قالوا نعم قال اللهم هل بلغت حدثنا عفان قال حدثني ربيعة قال حدثني أبي قال سمعت أبا غادية الجهني قال بايعت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يوم العقبة فقال يا أيها الناس إن دماءكم فذكر مثله
iwh_en: ʿAbd al-Ṣamad ibn ʿAbd al-Wārith narrated to us, he said: Rabīʿah ibn Kulthūm narrated to us, he said: My father narrated to me, from Abū Ghādiyah al-Juhanī, who said: The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ addressed us on the Day of ʿAqabah and said: 'O people, your blood and your wealth are sacred to you until you meet your Lord, as sacred as this day of yours, in this land of yours, in this month of yours. Have I conveyed?' They said, 'Yes.' He said, 'O Allāh, have I conveyed?' ʿAffān narrated to us, he said: Rabīʿah narrated to me, he said: My father narrated to me, he said: I heard Abū Ghādiyah al-Juhanī say: I pledged allegiance to the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ on the Day of ʿAqabah, and he said, 'O people, your blood...' and he mentioned the like of it.

ar: ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏الصَّلْتُ بْنُ مَسْعُودٍ الْجَحْدَرِيُّ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الطُّفَاوِيُّ ‏ ‏قَالَ سَمِعْتُ ‏ ‏الْعَاصِ بْنَ عَمْرٍو الطُّفَاوِيَّ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏خَرَجَ ‏ ‏أَبُو الْغَادِيَةِ ‏ ‏وحَبِيبُ بْنُ الْحَارِثِ ‏ ‏وَأُمُّ أَبِي الْعَالِيَةِ ‏ ‏مُهَاجِرِينَ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏فَأَسْلَمُوا فَقَالَتْ الْمَرْأَةُ أَوْصِنِي يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ قَالَ ‏ ‏إِيَّاكِ وَمَا يَسُوءُ الْأُذُنَ ‏
ar_clean: قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي الصَّلْتُ بْنُ مَسْعُودٍ الْجَحْدَرِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الطُّفَاوِيُّ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ الْعَاصِ بْنَ عَمْرٍو الطُّفَاوِيَّ قَالَ خَرَجَ أَبُو الْغَادِيَةِ وحَبِيبُ بْنُ الْحَارِثِ وَأُمُّ أَبِي الْعَالِيَةِ مُهَاجِرِينَ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَأَسْلَمُوا فَقَالَتْ الْمَرْأَةُ أَوْصِنِي يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ قَالَ إِيَّاكِ وَمَا يَسُوءُ الْأُذُنَ
sunnah_ref_en: Al-Ṣalt ibn Masʿūd al-Jaḥdarī narrated to me, he said: Muḥammad ibn ʿAbd al-Raḥmān al-Ṭufāwī narrated to us, he said: I heard al-ʿĀṣ ibn ʿAmr al-Ṭufāwī say: Abū al-Ghādiyah, Ḥabīb ibn al-Ḥārith, and Umm Abī al-ʿĀliyah set out as emigrants to the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ, and they accepted Islam. The woman said, 'Advise me, O Messenger of Allāh.' He said: 'Beware of what offends the ear.'
iwh_id: Al-Ṣalt ibn Masʿūd al-Jaḥdarī menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: Muḥammad ibn ʿAbd al-Raḥmān al-Ṭufāwī menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: aku mendengar al-ʿĀṣ ibn ʿAmr al-Ṭufāwī say: Abū al-Ghādiyah, Ḥabīb ibn al-Ḥārith, and Umm Abī al-ʿĀliyah set out as emigrants to Rasulullah ﷺ, and they accepted Islam. The woman berkata, 'Advise me, O Messenger of Allāh.' He berkata: 'Beware of what offends the ear.'
isnad_ar: قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي الصَّلْتُ بْنُ مَسْعُودٍ الْجَحْدَرِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الطُّفَاوِيُّ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ الْعَاصِ بْنَ عَمْرٍو الطُّفَاوِيَّ قَالَ خَرَجَ أَبُو الْغَادِيَةِ وحَبِيبُ بْنُ الْحَارِثِ وَأُ
matn_ar: مُّ أَبِي الْعَالِيَةِ مُهَاجِرِينَ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَأَسْلَمُوا فَقَالَتْ الْمَرْأَةُ أَوْصِنِي يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ قَالَ إِيَّاكِ وَمَا يَسُوءُ الْأُذُنَ
matn_ar_clean: م أبي العالية مهاجرين إلى رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم فأسلموا فقالت المرأة أوصني يا رسول الله قال إياك وما يسوء الأذن
iwh_en: Al-Ṣalt ibn Masʿūd al-Jaḥdarī narrated to me, he said: Muḥammad ibn ʿAbd al-Raḥmān al-Ṭufāwī narrated to us, he said: I heard al-ʿĀṣ ibn ʿAmr al-Ṭufāwī say: Abū al-Ghādiyah, Ḥabīb ibn al-Ḥārith, and Umm Abī al-ʿĀliyah set out as emigrants to the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ, and they accepted Islam. The woman said, 'Advise me, O Messenger of Allāh.' He said: 'Beware of what offends the ear.'

ar: ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَكَّارٍ ‏ ‏مَوْلَى ‏ ‏بَنِي هَاشِمٍ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ ‏ ‏عَنِ ‏ ‏الْأَعْمَشِ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ بَحِيرٍ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏ضِرَارِ بْنِ الْأَزْوَرِ ‏ ‏أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏مَرَّ بِهِ وَهُوَ يَحْلِبُ فَقَالَ دَعْ دَاعِيَ اللَّبَنِ ‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَكَّارٍ مَوْلَى بَنِي هَاشِمٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ بَحِيرٍ عَنْ ضِرَارِ بْنِ الْأَزْوَرِ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَرَّ بِهِ وَهُوَ يَحْلِبُ فَقَالَ دَعْ دَاعِيَ اللَّبَنِ
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: Muḥammad ibn Bakkār, the freed slave of Banū Hāshim, narrated to us, he said: ʿAbdullāh ibn al-Mubārak narrated to us, from al-Aʿmash, from Yaʿqūb ibn Buḥayr, from Ḍirār ibn al-Azwar, that the Prophet ﷺ passed by him while he was milking and said: 'Leave the milk-caller (i.e., leave some milk in the udder to draw more).'
iwh_id: ʿAbdullāh menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Muḥammad ibn Bakkār, the freed slave of Banū Hāshim, menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: ʿAbdullāh ibn al-Mubārak menceritakan kepada kami, dari al-Aʿmash, dari Yaʿqūb ibn Buḥayr, dari Ḍirār ibn al-Azwar, bahwa Nabi ﷺ passed by him while he was milking and berkata: 'Leave the milk-caller (i.e., leave some milk in the udder to draw more).'
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَكَّارٍ مَوْلَى بَنِي هَاشِمٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ يَعْقُوبَ ب
matn_ar: ْنِ بَحِيرٍ عَنْ ضِرَارِ بْنِ الْأَزْوَرِ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَرَّ بِهِ وَهُوَ يَحْلِبُ فَقَالَ دَعْ دَاعِيَ اللَّبَنِ
matn_ar_clean: ن بحير عن ضرار بن الأزور أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم مر به وهو يحلب فقال دع داعي اللبن

isnad_chain.name_ar: محمد بن بكار مولى بني هاشم

iwh_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: Muḥammad ibn Bakkār, the freed slave of Banū Hāshim, narrated to us, he said: ʿAbdullāh ibn al-Mubārak narrated to us, from al-Aʿmash, from Yaʿqūb ibn Buḥayr, from Ḍirār ibn al-Azwar, that the Prophet ﷺ passed by him while he was milking and said: 'Leave the milk-caller (i.e., leave some milk in the udder to draw more).'

ar: ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏أَبُو بَكْرِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏جَارُنَا ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ الْبَاهِلِيُّ الْأَثْرَمُ الْبَصْرِيُّ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏سَلَّامُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ الْقَارِئُ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَاصِمُ بْنُ بَهْدَلَةَ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏أَبِي وَائِلٍ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏ضِرَارِ بْنِ الْأَزْوَرِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏أَتَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏فَقُلْتُ امْدُدْ يَدَكَ أُبَايِعْكَ عَلَى الْإِسْلَامِ قَالَ ‏ ‏ضِرَارٌ ‏ ‏ثُمَّ قُلْتُ ‏ ‏تَرَكْتُ ‏ ‏الْقِدَاحَ ‏ ‏وَعَزْفَ ‏ ‏الْقِيَانِ ‏ ‏وَالْخَمْرَ تَصْلِيَةً وَابْتِهَالَا ‏ ‏وَكَرِّي ‏ ‏الْمُحَبَّرَ ‏ ‏فِي غَمْرَةٍ ‏ ‏وَحَمْلِي عَلَى الْمُشْرِكِينَ ‏ ‏الْقِتَالَا ‏ ‏فَيَا رَبِّ لَا ‏ ‏أُغْبَنَنْ ‏ ‏صَفْقَتِي ‏ ‏فَقَدْ بِعْتُ مَالِي وَأَهْلِي ‏ ‏ابْتِدَالَا ‏ ‏فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏مَا ‏ ‏غُبِنَتْ ‏ ‏صَفْقَتُكَ يَا ‏ ‏ضِرَارُ ‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ جَارُنَا قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ الْبَاهِلِيُّ الْأَثْرَمُ الْبَصْرِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَلَّامُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ الْقَارِئُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَاصِمُ بْنُ بَهْدَلَةَ عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ عَنْ ضِرَارِ بْنِ الْأَزْوَرِ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقُلْتُ امْدُدْ يَدَكَ أُبَايِعْكَ عَلَى الْإِسْلَامِ قَالَ ضِرَارٌ ثُمَّ قُلْتُ تَرَكْتُ الْقِدَاحَ وَعَزْفَ الْقِيَانِ وَالْخَمْرَ تَصْلِيَةً وَابْتِهَالَا وَكَرِّي الْمُحَبَّرَ فِي غَمْرَةٍ وَحَمْلِي عَلَى الْمُشْرِكِينَ الْقِتَالَا فَيَا رَبِّ لَا أُغْبَنَنْ صَفْقَتِي فَقَدْ بِعْتُ مَالِي وَأَهْلِي ابْتِدَالَا فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَا غُبِنَتْ صَفْقَتُكَ يَا ضِرَارُ
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: Abū Bakr Muḥammad ibn ʿAbdillāh, our neighbor, narrated to us, he said: Muḥammad ibn Saʿīd al-Bāhilī al-Athram al-Baṣrī narrated to us, he said: Sallām ibn Sulaymān al-Qāriʾ narrated to us, he said: ʿĀṣim ibn Bahdala narrated to us, from Abū Wāʾil, from Ḍirār ibn al-Azwar, who said: I came to the Prophet ﷺ and said, 'Extend your hand so I may pledge allegiance to you upon Islam.' Ḍirār then recited: 'I have left the divining arrows and the playing of singing-girls, and wine — in devotion and supplication. And my charging of the adorned horse into the fray, and my bearing of combat against the polytheists. So O my Lord, let my bargain not be cheated, for I have sold my wealth and my family in exchange.' The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ said: 'Your bargain has not been cheated, O Ḍirār.'
iwh_id: ʿAbdullāh menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Abū Bakr Muḥammad ibn ʿAbdillāh, our neighbor, menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Muḥammad ibn Saʿīd al-Bāhilī al-Athram al-Baṣrī menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Sallām ibn Sulaymān al-Qāriʾ menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: ʿĀṣim ibn Bahdala menceritakan kepada kami, dari Abū Wāʾil, dari Ḍirār ibn al-Azwar, yang berkata: aku datang to Nabi ﷺ and berkata, 'Extend your hand so I may pledge allegiance to you upon Islam.' Ḍirār then recited: 'I have left the divining arrows and the playing of singing-girls, and wine — in devotion and supplication. And my charging of the adorned horse into the fray, and my bearing of combat against the polytheists. So O my Lord, let my bargain not be cheated, for I have sold my wealth and my family in exchange.' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Your bargain has not been cheated, O Ḍirār.'
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ جَارُنَا قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ الْبَاهِلِيُّ الْأَثْرَمُ الْبَصْرِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَلَّامُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ الْقَارِئُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَاصِمُ بْنُ بَهْدَلَةَ عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ عَنْ ضِرَارِ بْنِ الْأَزْوَرِ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقُلْتُ امْدُدْ يَدَكَ أُبَايِعْكَ
matn_ar: عَلَى الْإِسْلَامِ قَالَ ضِرَارٌ ثُمَّ قُلْتُ تَرَكْتُ الْقِدَاحَ وَعَزْفَ الْقِيَانِ وَالْخَمْرَ تَصْلِيَةً وَابْتِهَالَا وَكَرِّي الْمُحَبَّرَ فِي غَمْرَةٍ وَحَمْلِي عَلَى الْمُشْرِكِينَ الْقِتَالَا فَيَا رَبِّ لَا أُغْبَنَنْ صَفْقَتِي فَقَدْ بِعْتُ مَالِي وَأَهْلِي ابْتِدَالَا فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَا غُبِنَتْ صَفْقَتُكَ يَا ضِرَارُ
matn_ar_clean: على الإسلام قال ضرار ثم قلت تركت القداح وعزف القيان والخمر تصلية وابتهالا وكري المحبر في غمرة وحملي على المشركين القتالا فيا رب لا أغبنن صفقتي فقد بعت مالي وأهلي ابتدالا فقال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ما غبنت صفقتك يا ضرار

isnad_chain.name_ar: محمد بن سعيد الباهلي الأثرم البصري

iwh_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: Abū Bakr Muḥammad ibn ʿAbdillāh, our neighbor, narrated to us, he said: Muḥammad ibn Saʿīd al-Bāhilī al-Athram al-Baṣrī narrated to us, he said: Sallām ibn Sulaymān al-Qāriʾ narrated to us, he said: ʿĀṣim ibn Bahdala narrated to us, from Abū Wāʾil, from Ḍirār ibn al-Azwar, who said: I came to the Prophet ﷺ and said, 'Extend your hand so I may pledge allegiance to you upon Islam.' Ḍirār then recited: 'I have left the divining arrows and the playing of singing-girls, and wine — in devotion and supplication. And my charging of the adorned horse into the fray, and my bearing of combat against the polytheists. So O my Lord, let my bargain not be cheated, for I have sold my wealth and my family in exchange.' The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ said: 'Your bargain has not been cheated, O Ḍirār.'

ar: ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ نُمَيْرٍ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏وَكِيعٌ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏الْأَعْمَشُ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ بَحِيرٍ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏ضِرَارِ بْنِ الْأَزْوَرِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏بَعَثَنِي أَهْلِي ‏ ‏بِلَقُوحٍ ‏ ‏إِلَى النَّبِيِّ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏فَأَمَرَنِي أَنْ أَحْلِبَهَا فَحَلَبْتُهَا فَقَالَ دَعْ دَاعِيَ اللَّبَنِ ‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ نُمَيْرٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَعْمَشُ عَنْ يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ بَحِيرٍ عَنْ ضِرَارِ بْنِ الْأَزْوَرِ قَالَ بَعَثَنِي أَهْلِي بِلَقُوحٍ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَأَمَرَنِي أَنْ أَحْلِبَهَا فَحَلَبْتُهَا فَقَالَ دَعْ دَاعِيَ اللَّبَنِ
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, Muḥammad ibn ʿAbdillāh ibn Numayr narrated to me, he said: Wakīʿ narrated to us, he said: al-Aʿmash narrated to us, from Yaʿqūb ibn Buḥayr, from Ḍirār ibn al-Azwar, who said: My family sent me with a she-camel that had recently given birth to the Prophet ﷺ, and he commanded me to milk her. So I milked her, and he said: 'Leave the milk-caller (i.e., leave some milk in the udder to draw more).'
iwh_id: ʿAbdullāh menceritakan kepada kami, Muḥammad ibn ʿAbdillāh ibn Numayr menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: Wakīʿ menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: al-Aʿmash menceritakan kepada kami, dari Yaʿqūb ibn Buḥayr, dari Ḍirār ibn al-Azwar, yang berkata: My family sent me with a she-camel that had recently given birth to Nabi ﷺ, and he commanded me to milk her. So I milked her, and dia berkata: 'Leave the milk-caller (i.e., leave some milk in the udder to draw more).'
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ نُمَيْرٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَعْمَشُ عَنْ يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ بَحِيرٍ عَنْ ضِرَارِ بْنِ الْأَزْوَ
matn_ar: رِ قَالَ بَعَثَنِي أَهْلِي بِلَقُوحٍ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَأَمَرَنِي أَنْ أَحْلِبَهَا فَحَلَبْتُهَا فَقَالَ دَعْ دَاعِيَ اللَّبَنِ
matn_ar_clean: ر قال بعثني أهلي بلقوح إلى النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فأمرني أن أحلبها فحلبتها فقال دع داعي اللبن

isnad_chain.name_ar: محمد بن عبد الله بن نمير

iwh_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, Muḥammad ibn ʿAbdillāh ibn Numayr narrated to me, he said: Wakīʿ narrated to us, he said: al-Aʿmash narrated to us, from Yaʿqūb ibn Buḥayr, from Ḍirār ibn al-Azwar, who said: My family sent me with a she-camel that had recently given birth to the Prophet ﷺ, and he commanded me to milk her. So I milked her, and he said: 'Leave the milk-caller (i.e., leave some milk in the udder to draw more).'

ar: ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏أَبُو صَالِحٌ الْحَكَمُ بْنُ مُوسَى ‏ ‏قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا ‏ ‏عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏الْأَعْمَشِ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏عَمْرِو بْنِ مُرَّةَ ‏ ‏عَنِ ‏ ‏الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏أَبِيهِ ‏ ‏أَوْ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏عَمِّهِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏أَتَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏بِعَرَفَةَ ‏ ‏فَأَخَذْتُ ‏ ‏بِزِمَامِ ‏ ‏نَاقَتِهِ ‏ ‏أَوْ ‏ ‏بِخِطَامِهَا ‏ ‏فَدَفَعْتُ عَنْهُ فَقَالَ دَعُوهُ ‏ ‏فَأَرَبٌ ‏ ‏مَا جَاءَ بِهِ فَقُلْتُ ‏ ‏نَبِّئْنِي بِعَمَلٍ يُقَرِّبُنِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ وَيُبْعِدُنِي مِنْ النَّارِ قَالَ فَرَفَعَ رَأْسَهُ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَئِنْ كُنْتَ أَوْجَزْتَ فِي الْخُطْبَةِ لَقَدْ أَعْظَمْتَ ‏ ‏أَوْ أَطْوَلْتَ ‏ ‏تَعْبُدُ اللَّهَ لَا تُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئًا وَتُقِيمُ الصَّلَاةَ ‏ ‏وَتُؤْتِي الزَّكَاةَ وَتَحُجُّ ‏ ‏الْبَيْتَ ‏ ‏وَتَصُومُ رَمَضَانَ ‏ ‏وَتَأْتِي إِلَى النَّاسِ مَا تُحِبُّ أَنْ يُؤْتُوهُ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا كَرِهْتَ لِنَفْسِكَ فَدَعْ النَّاسَ مِنْهُ خَلِّ عَنْ ‏ ‏زِمَامِ ‏ ‏النَّاقَةِ ‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو صَالِحٌ الْحَكَمُ بْنُ مُوسَى قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ عَنْ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مُرَّةَ عَنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ أَوْ عَنْ عَمِّهِ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِعَرَفَةَ فَأَخَذْتُ بِزِمَامِ نَاقَتِهِ أَوْ بِخِطَامِهَا فَدَفَعْتُ عَنْهُ فَقَالَ دَعُوهُ فَأَرَبٌ مَا جَاءَ بِهِ فَقُلْتُ نَبِّئْنِي بِعَمَلٍ يُقَرِّبُنِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ وَيُبْعِدُنِي مِنْ النَّارِ قَالَ فَرَفَعَ رَأْسَهُ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَئِنْ كُنْتَ أَوْجَزْتَ فِي الْخُطْبَةِ لَقَدْ أَعْظَمْتَ أَوْ أَطْوَلْتَ تَعْبُدُ اللَّهَ لَا تُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئًا وَتُقِيمُ الصَّلَاةَ وَتُؤْتِي الزَّكَاةَ وَتَحُجُّ الْبَيْتَ وَتَصُومُ رَمَضَانَ وَتَأْتِي إِلَى النَّاسِ مَا تُحِبُّ أَنْ يُؤْتُوهُ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا كَرِهْتَ لِنَفْسِكَ فَدَعْ النَّاسَ مِنْهُ خَلِّ عَنْ زِمَامِ النَّاقَةِ
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, Abū Ṣāliḥ al-Ḥakam ibn Mūsā narrated to me, he said: ʿĪsā ibn Yūnus informed us, from al-Aʿmash, from ʿAmr ibn Murrah, from al-Mughīrah ibn Saʿd, from his father — or from his uncle — who said: I came to the Prophet ﷺ at ʿArafah. I took hold of the rein — or the halter — of his she-camel and pushed people back from him. He said: 'Leave him, for an important matter has brought him.' I said, 'Inform me of a deed that will bring me near to Paradise and distance me from the Fire.' He raised his head to the sky, then said: 'If you have been concise in your speech, you have indeed asked about something great' — or 'something lengthy.' 'You worship Allāh, associating nothing with Him, establish the prayer, pay the zakāh, perform the pilgrimage to the House, fast Ramaḍān, and treat people as you would like them to treat you, and what you dislike for yourself, spare people from it. Release the rein of the she-camel.'
iwh_id: ʿAbdullāh menceritakan kepada kami, Abū Ṣāliḥ al-Ḥakam ibn Mūsā menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: ʿĪsā ibn Yūnus mengabarkan kepada kami, dari al-Aʿmash, dari ʿAmr ibn Murrah, dari al-Mughīrah ibn Saʿd, dari his father — or dari his uncle — yang berkata: aku datang to Nabi ﷺ at ʿArafah. I took hold of the rein — or the halter — of his she-camel and pushed people back from him. He berkata: 'Leave him, for an important matter has brought him.' aku berkata, 'Inform me of a deed that will bring me near to Surga and distance me from neraka.' He raised his head to the sky, then berkata: 'If you have been concise in your speech, you have indeed asked about something great' — or 'something lengthy.' 'You worship Allāh, associating nothing with Him, establish shalat, pay the zakāh, perform the haji to the House, fast Ramaḍān, and treat people as you would like them to treat you, and what you dislike for yourself, spare people from it. Release the rein of the she-camel.'
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو صَالِحٌ الْحَكَمُ بْنُ مُوسَى قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ عَنْ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مُرَّةَ عَنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ أَوْ عَنْ عَمِّهِ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِعَرَفَةَ فَأَخَذْتُ بِزِمَامِ نَاقَ
matn_ar: تِهِ أَوْ بِخِطَامِهَا فَدَفَعْتُ عَنْهُ فَقَالَ دَعُوهُ فَأَرَبٌ مَا جَاءَ بِهِ فَقُلْتُ نَبِّئْنِي بِعَمَلٍ يُقَرِّبُنِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ وَيُبْعِدُنِي مِنْ النَّارِ قَالَ فَرَفَعَ رَأْسَهُ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَئِنْ كُنْتَ أَوْجَزْتَ فِي الْخُطْبَةِ لَقَدْ أَعْظَمْتَ أَوْ أَطْوَلْتَ تَعْبُدُ اللَّهَ لَا تُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئًا وَتُقِيمُ الصَّلَاةَ وَتُؤْتِي الزَّكَاةَ وَتَحُجُّ الْبَيْتَ وَتَصُومُ رَمَضَانَ وَتَأْتِي إِلَى النَّاسِ مَا تُحِبُّ أَنْ يُؤْتُوهُ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا كَرِهْتَ لِنَفْسِكَ فَدَعْ النَّاسَ مِنْهُ خَلِّ عَنْ زِمَامِ النَّاقَةِ
matn_ar_clean: ته أو بخطامها فدفعت عنه فقال دعوه فأرب ما جاء به فقلت نبئني بعمل يقربني إلى الجنة ويبعدني من النار قال فرفع رأسه إلى السماء ثم قال لئن كنت أوجزت في الخطبة لقد أعظمت أو أطولت تعبد الله لا تشرك به شيئا وتقيم الصلاة وتؤتي الزكاة وتحج البيت وتصوم رمضان وتأتي إلى الناس ما تحب أن يؤتوه إليك وما كرهت لنفسك فدع الناس منه خل عن زمام الناقة
iwh_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, Abū Ṣāliḥ al-Ḥakam ibn Mūsā narrated to me, he said: ʿĪsā ibn Yūnus informed us, from al-Aʿmash, from ʿAmr ibn Murrah, from al-Mughīrah ibn Saʿd, from his father — or from his uncle — who said: I came to the Prophet ﷺ at ʿArafah. I took hold of the rein — or the halter — of his she-camel and pushed people back from him. He said: 'Leave him, for an important matter has brought him.' I said, 'Inform me of a deed that will bring me near to Paradise and distance me from the Fire.' He raised his head to the sky, then said: 'If you have been concise in your speech, you have indeed asked about something great' — or 'something lengthy.' 'You worship Allāh, associating nothing with Him, establish the prayer, pay the zakāh, perform the pilgrimage to the House, fast Ramaḍān, and treat people as you would like them to treat you, and what you dislike for yourself, spare people from it. Release the rein of the she-camel.'

ar: ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنَزِيُّ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَثْمَةَ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏سَعِيدُ بْنُ بَشِيرٍ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏قَتَادَةَ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏أَبِي قِلَابَةَ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏أَبِي الشَّعْثَاءِ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏يُونُسَ بْنِ شَدَّادٍ ‏ ‏أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏نَهَى عَنْ صَوْمِ ‏ ‏أَيَّامِ التَّشْرِيقِ ‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنَزِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَثْمَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ بَشِيرٍ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ أَبِي قِلَابَةَ عَنْ أَبِي الشَّعْثَاءِ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ شَدَّادٍ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ نَهَى عَنْ صَوْمِ أَيَّامِ التَّشْرِيقِ
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī narrated to me, he said: Muḥammad ibn ʿUthmah narrated to us, he said: Saʿīd ibn Bashīr narrated to us, from Qatādah, from Abū Qilābah, from Abū al-Shaʿthāʾ, from Yūnus ibn Shaddād, that the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ forbade fasting on the days of Tashrīq (11th, 12th, and 13th of Dhū al-Ḥijjah).
iwh_id: ʿAbdullāh menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: Muḥammad ibn ʿUthmah menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Saʿīd ibn Bashīr menceritakan kepada kami, dari Qatādah, dari Abū Qilābah, dari Abū al-Shaʿthāʾ, dari Yūnus ibn Shaddād, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang puasa on the days of Tashrīq (11th, 12th, and 13th of Dhū al-Ḥijjah).
matn_ar: ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏أَبُو مُوسَى الْعَنَزِيُّ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَثْمَةَ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏سَعِيدُ بْنُ بَشِيرٍ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏قَتَادَةَ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏أَبِي قِلَابَةَ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏أَبِي الشَّعْثَاءِ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏يُونُسَ بْنِ شَدَّادٍ ‏ ‏أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏نَهَى عَنْ صَوْمِ ‏ ‏أَيَّامِ التَّشْرِيقِ ‏
matn_ar_clean: ‏ ‏حدثنا ‏ ‏عبد الله ‏ ‏قال ‏ ‏حدثني ‏ ‏أبو موسى العنزي ‏ ‏قال حدثنا ‏ ‏محمد بن عثمة ‏ ‏قال حدثنا ‏ ‏سعيد بن بشير ‏ ‏عن ‏ ‏قتادة ‏ ‏عن ‏ ‏أبي قلابة ‏ ‏عن ‏ ‏أبي الشعثاء ‏ ‏عن ‏ ‏يونس بن شداد ‏ ‏أن رسول الله ‏ ‏صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏ ‏نهى عن صوم ‏ ‏أيام التشريق ‏
iwh_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: Abū Mūsā al-ʿAnazī narrated to me, he said: Muḥammad ibn ʿUthmah narrated to us, he said: Saʿīd ibn Bashīr narrated to us, from Qatādah, from Abū Qilābah, from Abū al-Shaʿthāʾ, from Yūnus ibn Shaddād, that the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ forbade fasting on the days of Tashrīq (11th, 12th, and 13th of Dhū al-Ḥijjah).

ar: ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏مَعْدِيُّ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ ‏ ‏قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏شُعَيْثُ بْنُ مُطَيْرٍ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏أَبِيهِ ‏ ‏مُطَيْرٍ ‏ ‏ومُطَيْرٌ ‏ ‏حَاضِرٌ يُصَدِّقُهُ مَقَالَتَهُ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏كَيْفَ كُنْتُ أَخْبَرْتُكَ قَالَ يَا أَبَتَاهُ أَخْبَرْتَنِي أَنَّكَ لَقِيَكَ ‏ ‏ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ ‏ ‏بِذِي خُشُبٍ ‏ ‏فَأَخْبَرَكَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏صَلَّى بِهِمْ إِحْدَى صَلَاتَيْ الْعَشِيِّ وَهِيَ الْعَصْرُ فَصَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ وَخَرَجَ ‏ ‏سَرَعَانُ ‏ ‏النَّاسِ وَهُمْ يَقُولُونَ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ فَقَامَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏وَاتَّبَعَهُ ‏ ‏أَبُو بَكْرٍ ‏ ‏وَعُمَرُ ‏ ‏رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا ‏ ‏وَهُمَا مُبْتَدٍ فَلَحِقَهُ ‏ ‏ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ ‏ ‏فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ أَمْ نَسِيتَ فَقَالَ ‏ ‏مَا قَصُرَتْ وَلَا نَسِيتُ ثُمَّ أَقْبَلَ عَلَى ‏ ‏أَبِي بَكْرٍ ‏ ‏وَعُمَرَ ‏ ‏رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا ‏ ‏فَقَالَ مَا يَقُولُ ‏ ‏ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ ‏ ‏فَقَالَا صَدَقَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ فَرَجَعَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏وَثَابَ ‏ ‏النَّاسُ فَصَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ ثُمَّ سَجَدَ سَجْدَتَيْ السَّهْوِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏أَبُو سُلَيْمَانَ ‏ ‏حَدَّثْتُ سِتَّ سِنِينَ ‏ ‏أَوْ سَبْعَ سِنِينَ ‏ ‏ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ وَشَكَكْتُ فِيهِ وَهُوَ أَكْثَرُ حِفْظِي ‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَعْدِيُّ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعَيْثُ بْنُ مُطَيْرٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ مُطَيْرٍ ومُطَيْرٌ حَاضِرٌ يُصَدِّقُهُ مَقَالَتَهُ قَالَ كَيْفَ كُنْتُ أَخْبَرْتُكَ قَالَ يَا أَبَتَاهُ أَخْبَرْتَنِي أَنَّكَ لَقِيَكَ ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ بِذِي خُشُبٍ فَأَخْبَرَكَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ صَلَّى بِهِمْ إِحْدَى صَلَاتَيْ الْعَشِيِّ وَهِيَ الْعَصْرُ فَصَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ وَخَرَجَ سَرَعَانُ النَّاسِ وَهُمْ يَقُولُونَ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ فَقَامَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَاتَّبَعَهُ أَبُو بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرُ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا وَهُمَا مُبْتَدٍ فَلَحِقَهُ ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ أَمْ نَسِيتَ فَقَالَ مَا قَصُرَتْ وَلَا نَسِيتُ ثُمَّ أَقْبَلَ عَلَى أَبِي بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا فَقَالَ مَا يَقُولُ ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ فَقَالَا صَدَقَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ فَرَجَعَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَثَابَ النَّاسُ فَصَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ ثُمَّ سَجَدَ سَجْدَتَيْ السَّهْوِ قَالَ أَبُو سُلَيْمَانَ حَدَّثْتُ سِتَّ سِنِينَ أَوْ سَبْعَ سِنِينَ ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ وَشَكَكْتُ فِيهِ وَهُوَ أَكْثَرُ حِفْظِي
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: Muḥammad ibn al-Muthannā narrated to me, he said: Maʿdī ibn Sulaymān narrated to us, he said: Shuʿayth ibn Muṭayr narrated to us, from his father Muṭayr — and Muṭayr was present, confirming his account — who said: 'How was it I told you?' He said, 'O my father, you told me that Dhū al-Yadayn met you at Dhī Khushub and told you that the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ led them in one of the two afternoon prayers — and it was ʿAṣr — praying only two rakʿahs. The quick ones among the people left saying, "Has the prayer been shortened?" The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ stood up, and Abū Bakr and ʿUmar رضي الله عنهما followed him, beginning to speak. Dhū al-Yadayn caught up with him and said, "O Messenger of Allāh, has the prayer been shortened? Has the prayer been shortened? Or did you forget?" He said, "It has not been shortened, nor did I forget." Then he turned to Abū Bakr and ʿUmar رضي الله عنهما and said, "What is Dhū al-Yadayn saying?" They said, "He speaks the truth, O Messenger of Allāh." So the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ returned, and the people gathered back, and he prayed two more rakʿahs, then gave salām, then performed two prostrations of forgetfulness.' Abū Sulaymān said: 'I narrated it for six or seven years as "then he gave salām," but I was uncertain about it, though it is the stronger of my recollections.'
iwh_id: ʿAbdullāh menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Muḥammad ibn al-Muthannā menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: Maʿdī ibn Sulaymān menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: Shuʿayth ibn Muṭayr menceritakan kepada kami, dari his father Muṭayr — and Muṭayr was present, confirming his account — yang berkata: 'How was it I told you?' He berkata, 'O my father, you memberitahukan kepadaku that Dhū al-Yadayn met you at Dhī Khushub and told you bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ led them in one of the two afternoon prayers — and it was ʿAṣr — praying only two rakʿahs. The quick ones among the people left seraya berkata, "Has shalat been shortened?" Rasulullah ﷺ stood up, and Abū Bakr and ʿUmar (radhiyallahu 'anhu)ما followed him, beginning to speak. Dhū al-Yadayn caught up with him and berkata, "O Messenger of Allāh, has shalat been shortened? Has shalat been shortened? Or did you forget?" He berkata, "It has not been shortened, nor did I forget." Then he turned to Abū Bakr and ʿUmar (radhiyallahu 'anhu)ما and berkata, "What is Dhū al-Yadayn seraya berkata?" They berkata, "He speaks the truth, O Messenger of Allāh." So Rasulullah ﷺ returned, and the people gathered back, and dia shalat two more rakʿahs, then gave salām, then performed two prostrations of forgetfulness.' Abū Sulaymān berkata: 'I meriwayatkan it for six or seven years as "then he gave salām," but I was uncertain about it, though it is the stronger of my recollections.'
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مَعْدِيُّ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعَيْثُ بْنُ مُطَيْرٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ مُطَيْرٍ ومُطَيْرٌ حَاضِرٌ يُصَدِّقُهُ مَقَالَتَهُ قَالَ كَيْفَ كُنْتُ أَخْبَرْتُكَ قَالَ يَا أَبَتَاهُ أَخْبَرْتَنِي أَنَّكَ لَقِيَكَ ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ بِذِي خُشُبٍ فَأَخْبَرَكَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ صَلَّى بِهِمْ إِحْدَى صَلَاتَيْ الْعَشِيِّ وَهِيَ الْعَصْرُ فَصَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ وَخَرَجَ سَرَعَانُ النَّاسِ وَهُمْ يَقُولُونَ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ فَقَامَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَاتَّبَعَهُ أَبُو بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرُ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ
matn_ar: عَنْهُمَا وَهُمَا مُبْتَدٍ فَلَحِقَهُ ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ أَمْ نَسِيتَ فَقَالَ مَا قَصُرَتْ وَلَا نَسِيتُ ثُمَّ أَقْبَلَ عَلَى أَبِي بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا فَقَالَ مَا يَقُولُ ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ فَقَالَا صَدَقَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ فَرَجَعَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَثَابَ النَّاسُ فَصَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ ثُمَّ سَجَدَ سَجْدَتَيْ السَّهْوِ قَالَ أَبُو سُلَيْمَانَ حَدَّثْتُ سِتَّ سِنِينَ أَوْ سَبْعَ سِنِينَ ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ وَشَكَكْتُ فِيهِ وَهُوَ أَكْثَرُ حِفْظِي
matn_ar_clean: عنهما وهما مبتد فلحقه ذو اليدين فقال يا رسول الله أقصرت الصلاة أقصرت الصلاة أم نسيت فقال ما قصرت ولا نسيت ثم أقبل على أبي بكر وعمر رضي الله عنهما فقال ما يقول ذو اليدين فقالا صدق يا رسول الله فرجع رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم وثاب الناس فصلى ركعتين ثم سلم ثم سجد سجدتي السهو قال أبو سليمان حدثت ست سنين أو سبع سنين ثم سلم وشككت فيه وهو أكثر حفظي

isnad_chain.name_ar: أبيه مطير ومطير حاضر يصدقه مقالته

iwh_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: Muḥammad ibn al-Muthannā narrated to me, he said: Maʿdī ibn Sulaymān narrated to us, he said: Shuʿayth ibn Muṭayr narrated to us, from his father Muṭayr — and Muṭayr was present, confirming his account — who said: 'How was it I told you?' He said, 'O my father, you told me that Dhū al-Yadayn met you at Dhī Khushub and told you that the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ led them in one of the two afternoon prayers — and it was ʿAṣr — praying only two rakʿahs. The quick ones among the people left saying, "Has the prayer been shortened?" The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ stood up, and Abū Bakr and ʿUmar رضي الله عنهما followed him, beginning to speak. Dhū al-Yadayn caught up with him and said, "O Messenger of Allāh, has the prayer been shortened? Has the prayer been shortened? Or did you forget?" He said, "It has not been shortened, nor did I forget." Then he turned to Abū Bakr and ʿUmar رضي الله عنهما and said, "What is Dhū al-Yadayn saying?" They said, "He speaks the truth, O Messenger of Allāh." So the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ returned, and the people gathered back, and he prayed two more rakʿahs, then gave salām, then performed two prostrations of forgetfulness.' Abū Sulaymān said: 'I narrated it for six or seven years as "then he gave salām," but I was uncertain about it, though it is the stronger of my recollections.'

ar: ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏نَصْرُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ ‏ ‏قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي ‏ ‏مَعْدِيُّ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏أَتَيْتُ ‏ ‏مُطَيْرًا ‏ ‏لِأَسْأَلَهُ عَنْ حَدِيثِ ‏ ‏ذِي الْيَدَيْنِ ‏ ‏فَأَتَيْتُهُ فَسَأَلْتُهُ فَإِذَا هُوَ شَيْخٌ كَبِيرٌ لَا يُنْفِذُ الْحَدِيثَ مِنْ الْكِبَرِ ‏ ‏فَقَالَ ‏ ‏ابْنُهُ ‏ ‏شُعَيْثٌ ‏ ‏بَلَى يَا ‏ ‏أَبَتِ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَتْنِي أَنَّ ‏ ‏ذَا الْيَدَيْنِ ‏ ‏لَقِيَكَ ‏ ‏بِذِي خَشَبٍ ‏ ‏فَحَدَّثَكَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏صَلَّى بِهِمْ إِحْدَى صَلَاتَيْ الْعَشِيِّ وَهِيَ الْعَصْرُ رَكْعَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ فَخَرَجَ ‏ ‏سَرَعَانُ ‏ ‏النَّاسِ فَقَالَ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ وَفِي الْقَوْمِ ‏ ‏أَبُو بَكْرٍ ‏ ‏وَعُمَرُ ‏ ‏فَقَالَ ‏ ‏ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ ‏ ‏أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ أَمْ نَسِيتَ قَالَ ‏ ‏مَا قَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ وَلَا نَسِيتُ ثُمَّ أَقْبَلَ عَلَى ‏ ‏أَبِي بَكْرٍ ‏ ‏وَعُمَرَ ‏ ‏رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا ‏ ‏فَقَالَ مَا يَقُولُ ‏ ‏ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ ‏ ‏فَقَالَا صَدَقَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ فَرَجَعَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏وَثَابَ ‏ ‏النَّاسُ وَصَلَّى بِهِمْ رَكْعَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ ثُمَّ سَجَدَ بِهِمْ سَجْدَتَيْ السَّهْوِ ‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي نَصْرُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي مَعْدِيُّ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ مُطَيْرًا لِأَسْأَلَهُ عَنْ حَدِيثِ ذِي الْيَدَيْنِ فَأَتَيْتُهُ فَسَأَلْتُهُ فَإِذَا هُوَ شَيْخٌ كَبِيرٌ لَا يُنْفِذُ الْحَدِيثَ مِنْ الْكِبَرِ فَقَالَ ابْنُهُ شُعَيْثٌ بَلَى يَا أَبَتِ حَدَّثَتْنِي أَنَّ ذَا الْيَدَيْنِ لَقِيَكَ بِذِي خَشَبٍ فَحَدَّثَكَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ صَلَّى بِهِمْ إِحْدَى صَلَاتَيْ الْعَشِيِّ وَهِيَ الْعَصْرُ رَكْعَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ فَخَرَجَ سَرَعَانُ النَّاسِ فَقَالَ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ وَفِي الْقَوْمِ أَبُو بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرُ فَقَالَ ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ أَمْ نَسِيتَ قَالَ مَا قَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ وَلَا نَسِيتُ ثُمَّ أَقْبَلَ عَلَى أَبِي بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا فَقَالَ مَا يَقُولُ ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ فَقَالَا صَدَقَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ فَرَجَعَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَثَابَ النَّاسُ وَصَلَّى بِهِمْ رَكْعَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ ثُمَّ سَجَدَ بِهِمْ سَجْدَتَيْ السَّهْوِ
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, Naṣr ibn ʿAlī narrated to me, he said: Maʿdī ibn Sulaymān informed me, he said: I came to Muṭayr to ask him about the ḥadīth of Dhū al-Yadayn. I came to him and asked him, and he was an elderly man who could not get through the ḥadīth due to his old age. His son Shuʿayth said, 'Yes, O father, you told me that Dhū al-Yadayn met you at Dhī Khashab and told you that the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ led them in one of the two afternoon prayers — and it was ʿAṣr — praying two rakʿahs, then gave salām. The quick ones among the people left saying, "Has the prayer been shortened?" And in the group were Abū Bakr and ʿUmar. Dhū al-Yadayn said, "Has the prayer been shortened, or did you forget?" He said, "It has not been shortened, nor did I forget." Then he turned to Abū Bakr and ʿUmar رضي الله عنهما and said, "What is Dhū al-Yadayn saying?" They said, "He speaks the truth, O Messenger of Allāh." So the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ returned, and the people gathered back, and he led them in two more rakʿahs, then gave salām, then prostrated with them two prostrations of forgetfulness.'
iwh_id: ʿAbdullāh menceritakan kepada kami, Naṣr ibn ʿAlī menceritakan kepadaku, dia berkata: Maʿdī ibn Sulaymān mengabarkan kepadaku, dia berkata: aku datang to Muṭayr to ask him about the ḥadīth of Dhū al-Yadayn. aku datang to him and asked him, and he was an elderly man who could not get through the ḥadīth due to his old age. His son Shuʿayth berkata, 'Yes, O father, you memberitahukan kepadaku that Dhū al-Yadayn met you at Dhī Khashab and told you bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ led them in one of the two afternoon prayers — and it was ʿAṣr — praying two rakʿahs, then gave salām. The quick ones among the people left seraya berkata, "Has shalat been shortened?" And in the group were Abū Bakr and ʿUmar. Dhū al-Yadayn berkata, "Has shalat been shortened, or did you forget?" He berkata, "It has not been shortened, nor did I forget." Then he turned to Abū Bakr and ʿUmar (radhiyallahu 'anhu)ما and berkata, "What is Dhū al-Yadayn seraya berkata?" They berkata, "He speaks the truth, O Messenger of Allāh." So Rasulullah ﷺ returned, and the people gathered back, and he led them in two more rakʿahs, then gave salām, then prostrated with them two prostrations of forgetfulness.'
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي نَصْرُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي مَعْدِيُّ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ مُطَيْرًا لِأَسْأَلَهُ عَنْ حَدِيثِ ذِي الْيَدَيْنِ فَأَتَيْتُهُ فَسَأَلْتُهُ فَإِذَا هُوَ شَيْخٌ كَبِيرٌ لَا يُنْفِذُ الْحَدِيثَ مِنْ الْكِبَرِ فَقَالَ ابْنُهُ شُعَيْثٌ بَلَى يَا أَبَتِ حَدَّثَتْنِي أَنَّ ذَا الْيَدَيْنِ لَقِيَكَ بِذِي خَشَبٍ فَحَدَّثَكَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ صَلَّى بِهِمْ إِحْدَى صَلَاتَيْ ال
matn_ar: ْعَشِيِّ وَهِيَ الْعَصْرُ رَكْعَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ فَخَرَجَ سَرَعَانُ النَّاسِ فَقَالَ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ وَفِي الْقَوْمِ أَبُو بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرُ فَقَالَ ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ أَقَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ أَمْ نَسِيتَ قَالَ مَا قَصُرَتْ الصَّلَاةُ وَلَا نَسِيتُ ثُمَّ أَقْبَلَ عَلَى أَبِي بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا فَقَالَ مَا يَقُولُ ذُو الْيَدَيْنِ فَقَالَا صَدَقَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ فَرَجَعَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَثَابَ النَّاسُ وَصَلَّى بِهِمْ رَكْعَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ سَلَّمَ ثُمَّ سَجَدَ بِهِمْ سَجْدَتَيْ السَّهْوِ
matn_ar_clean: عشي وهي العصر ركعتين ثم سلم فخرج سرعان الناس فقال أقصرت الصلاة وفي القوم أبو بكر وعمر فقال ذو اليدين أقصرت الصلاة أم نسيت قال ما قصرت الصلاة ولا نسيت ثم أقبل على أبي بكر وعمر رضي الله عنهما فقال ما يقول ذو اليدين فقالا صدق يا رسول الله فرجع رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم وثاب الناس وصلى بهم ركعتين ثم سلم ثم سجد بهم سجدتي السهو
iwh_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, Naṣr ibn ʿAlī narrated to me, he said: Maʿdī ibn Sulaymān informed me, he said: I came to Muṭayr to ask him about the ḥadīth of Dhū al-Yadayn. I came to him and asked him, and he was an elderly man who could not get through the ḥadīth due to his old age. His son Shuʿayth said, 'Yes, O father, you told me that Dhū al-Yadayn met you at Dhī Khashab and told you that the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ led them in one of the two afternoon prayers — and it was ʿAṣr — praying two rakʿahs, then gave salām. The quick ones among the people left saying, "Has the prayer been shortened?" And in the group were Abū Bakr and ʿUmar. Dhū al-Yadayn said, "Has the prayer been shortened, or did you forget?" He said, "It has not been shortened, nor did I forget." Then he turned to Abū Bakr and ʿUmar رضي الله عنهما and said, "What is Dhū al-Yadayn saying?" They said, "He speaks the truth, O Messenger of Allāh." So the Messenger of Allāh ﷺ returned, and the people gathered back, and he led them in two more rakʿahs, then gave salām, then prostrated with them two prostrations of forgetfulness.'

ar: ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنِي ‏ ‏أَبُو مَعْمَرٍ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏ابْنِ أَبِي حَازِمٍ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى ‏ ‏عَلِيِّ بْنِ حُسَيْنٍ ‏ ‏فَقَالَ ‏ ‏مَا كَانَ مَنْزِلَةُ ‏ ‏أَبِي بَكْرٍ ‏ ‏وَعُمَرَ ‏ ‏مِنْ النَّبِيِّ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏فَقَالَ مَنْزِلَتُهُمَا السَّاعَةَ ‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو مَعْمَرٍ عَنْ ابْنِ أَبِي حَازِمٍ قَالَ جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى عَلِيِّ بْنِ حُسَيْنٍ فَقَالَ مَا كَانَ مَنْزِلَةُ أَبِي بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرَ مِنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ مَنْزِلَتُهُمَا السَّاعَةَ
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, Abū Maʿmar narrated to me, from Ibn Abī Ḥāzim, who said: A man came to ʿAlī ibn Ḥusayn and asked, 'What was the status of Abū Bakr and ʿUmar with the Prophet ﷺ?' He said: 'Their status is the same as it is now' — meaning they are buried beside him.
iwh_id: ʿAbdullāh menceritakan kepada kami, Abū Maʿmar menceritakan kepadaku, dari Ibn Abī Ḥāzim, yang berkata: A man came to ʿAlī ibn Ḥusayn and asked, 'What was the status of Abū Bakr and ʿUmar with Nabi ﷺ?' He berkata: 'Their status is the same as it is now' — yakni they are buried beside him.
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو مَعْمَرٍ عَنْ ابْنِ أَبِي حَازِمٍ قَالَ جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى عَلِيِّ بْنِ حُسَيْنٍ فَقَالَ مَا
matn_ar: كَانَ مَنْزِلَةُ أَبِي بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرَ مِنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ مَنْزِلَتُهُمَا السَّاعَةَ
matn_ar_clean: كان منزلة أبي بكر وعمر من النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال منزلتهما الساعة
iwh_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, Abū Maʿmar narrated to me, from Ibn Abī Ḥāzim, who said: A man came to ʿAlī ibn Ḥusayn and asked, 'What was the status of Abū Bakr and ʿUmar with the Prophet ﷺ?' He said: 'Their status is the same as it is now' — meaning they are buried beside him.

ar: ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَبْد اللَّهِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ الْقَوَارِيرِيُّ ‏ ‏وَخَلَفُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ ‏ ‏قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا ‏ ‏عَامِرُ بْنُ أَبِي عَامِرٍ الْخَزَّازُ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏أَيُّوبَ بْنِ مُوسَى ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏أَبِيهِ ‏ ‏عَنْ ‏ ‏جَدِّهِ ‏ ‏قَالَ ‏ ‏قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ‏ ‏صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ‏ ‏مَا ‏ ‏نَحَلَ ‏ ‏وَالِدٌ وَلَدَهُ ‏ ‏نُحْلًا ‏ ‏أَفْضَلَ مِنْ أَدَبٍ حَسَنٍ ‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ الْقَوَارِيرِيُّ وَخَلَفُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا عَامِرُ بْنُ أَبِي عَامِرٍ الْخَزَّازُ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ بْنِ مُوسَى عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ جَدِّهِ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَا نَحَلَ وَالِدٌ وَلَدَهُ نُحْلًا أَفْضَلَ مِنْ أَدَبٍ حَسَنٍ
sunnah_ref_en: ʿAbdullāh narrated to us, he said: ʿUbaydullāh ibn ʿUmar al-Qawārīrī and Khalaf ibn Hishām narrated to us, they said: ʿĀmir ibn Abī ʿĀmir al-Khazzāz narrated to us, from Ayyūb ibn Mūsā, from his father, from his grandfather, who said: The Messenger of Allāh ﷺ said: 'No parent has given a child a gift better than good manners.'
iwh_id: ʿAbdullāh menceritakan kepada kami, dia berkata: ʿUbaydullāh ibn ʿUmar al-Qawārīrī and Khalaf ibn Hishām menceritakan kepada kami, mereka berkata: ʿĀmir ibn Abī ʿĀmir al-Khazzāz menceritakan kepada kami, dari Ayyūb ibn Mūsā, dari his father, dari his grandfather, yang berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'No parent has given a child a gift better than good manners.'
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْد اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ الْقَوَارِيرِيُّ وَخَلَفُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا عَامِرُ
matn_ar: بْنُ أَبِي عَامِرٍ الْخَزَّازُ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ بْنِ مُوسَى عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ جَدِّهِ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَا نَحَلَ وَالِدٌ وَلَدَهُ نُحْلًا أَفْضَلَ مِنْ أَدَبٍ حَسَنٍ
matn_ar_clean: بن أبي عامر الخزاز عن أيوب بن موسى عن أبيه عن جده قال قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ما نحل والد ولده نحلا أفضل من أدب حسن
